title: Kaiju Unchained (Kaiju No. 8)
description: A anime mod based on the anime Kaiju No. 8
body:
# Kaiju Unchained

Kaiju Unchained is a mod that aims to add weapons, kaiju and abilities from the anime Kaiju No. 8

## Features

-Weapons with custom M1s and attacks

-Kaiju to fight and kill

-Armour to boost your fighting ability 

## Dependencies

-Geckolib

-PlayerAnimator

-Kleiders Custom Renderer

## Commands

/kaiju <target> rank <rank>

/kaiju <target> percent <number>

## Weapons/Armour

-Isao Shinomiyas Numbers 2

-Soshiro Hoshinas Twin Blades

-Gen Narumis Numbers 1

-Defense Force Knife

-Defense Force Battle Suit

-Custom Scale Wrap Weapon

## Future Features

-Kaiju shifting custom and canon

-Fighting styles for certain weapons

-Custom weapons

-Many kaiju to fight custom and canon

-Defense force members to fight with or against
